block.text: You are facing three Giant Lizards! You back into the corner of the room, so that you may fight them one at a time. You cannot try to escape until you have slain the first two.

enemy.name: Giant Lizard I
enemy.description: A giant lizard used in laboratory experiments.

enemy.name: Giant Lizard II
enemy.description: A giant lizard used in laboratory experiments.

enemy.name: Giant Lizard III
enemy.description: A giant lizard used in laboratory experiments.
